results.name: [01] baseline + stop25
results.description: all matches, 1y hold, $1K size, stop-loss at +25%

results.name: [02] baseline + stop25 + take50
results.description: + take-profit at -50% (lock in big winners)

results.name: [03] baseline $500 size
results.description: 5% of capital per position, no stops

results.name: [04] $500 + stop25
results.description: 5% size + stop25

results.name: [05] anti-momentum (skip if 6m up >10%)
results.description: don't short stocks that have been ripping; $1K + stop25

results.name: [06] strong anti-momentum (skip if 6m up >0%)
results.description: only short stocks already in downtrend; $1K + stop25

results.name: [07] sector + anti-momentum + stop25
results.description: drop loser sectors + anti-momentum + stop25

results.name: [08] kitchen sink
results.description: winning sectors + anti-mom (≤0%) + stop25 + take50 + no ocf-decline-2y

results.name: [09] ML > 0.55 + stop25
results.description: in-sample bias caveat; baseline + stop25 + ML filter

results.name: [10] ML > 0.55 + anti-mom + stop25
results.description: ML + anti-momentum + stop25

results.name: [11] kitchen sink, 6m hold
results.description: best combo at half the hold period

results.name: [12] kitchen sink, 24m hold
results.description: best combo at double the hold period

results.name: [13] pair trade — all matches
results.description: $1K/pos = $500 short + $500 long SPY, 1y hold

results.name: [14] pair trade + sectors
results.description: drop loser sectors, pair trade

results.name: [15] pair trade + anti-mom
results.description: anti-momentum (≤+10%) + pair trade

results.name: [16] pair trade kitchen sink
results.description: winning sectors + anti-mom (≤0%) + no ocf2y, pair trade

results.name: [17] $5K pair trade kitchen sink
results.description: scale up pair trade to $5K/pos (heavy concentration on best filter)

results.name: [18] tight stop15 (winning sector)
results.description: tight 15% stop, winning sectors only

results.name: [19] strong downtrend filter
results.description: only short stocks already down ≥10% in trailing 6m

results.name: [20] $3K pair kitchen sink
results.description: intermediate size, pair trade kitchen sink

results.name: [21] $2K pair sectors only
results.description: broader filter, smaller size, more trades

results.name: [22] $5K pair, EXCLUDE FY2019
results.description: robustness check — strip COVID-period events

results.name: [23] $5K pair, post-2018 only
results.description: out-of-sample-ish test (kitchen sink filter was selected on full data, but at least the test window is later)

results.name: [24] $5K pair + ML > 0.5
results.description: combine kitchen sink filter with model agreement (ML > 0.5)

results.name: [25] $5K pair + neg-eq filter
results.description: kitchen sink without high D/E (D/E ≤ 5) — may avoid bank-like blowup risk

results.name: [26] WINNING SECTORS ONLY (Util+CS+RE)
results.description: narrow filter to per-sector portfolio winners: Utilities, Consumer Staples, Real Estate. $5K pair, 1y hold.

results.name: [27] WINNERS + compounding 50%
results.description: winning sectors only, position size = 50% of running equity

results.name: [28] WINNERS + compounding 70%
results.description: winning sectors only, position size = 70% of running equity

results.name: [29] WINNERS + 2x leverage
results.description: winning sectors only, pair leverage 2 ($size short + $size long)

results.name: [30] WINNERS + 2x lev + compound 50%
results.description: leverage AND compounding, winning sectors

results.name: [31] WINNERS + idle cash @ 2%
results.description: winning sectors + earn 2% on undeployed cash

results.name: [32] FULL STACK
results.description: winning sectors + 2x leverage + compound 50% + idle cash 2%

results.name: [33] FULL STACK + Util + CS only (no RE)
results.description: tighter winning sectors, full stack

results.name: [34] U: $2.5K × 4 conc, winning sectors
results.description: unleveraged 1x, winning sectors (Util/CS/RE), 4 max concurrent

results.name: [35] U: compound 25% × 4 conc, winning sectors
results.description: unleveraged 1x with compounding (max 25% × 4 = 100%), winning sectors

results.name: [36] U: $5K × 2 conc, winning sectors
results.description: concentrated unleveraged: $5K/pos with only 2 max concurrent

results.name: [37] U: compound 50% × 2 conc, winning sectors
results.description: unleveraged 1x with compounding (50% × 2 = 100%), winning sectors

results.name: [38] U: $10K × 1 conc, winning sectors
results.description: fully concentrated unleveraged: one trade at a time

results.name: [39] U: compound 100% × 1 conc, winning sectors
results.description: all-in compounding: each trade is 100% of equity, 1 at a time

results.name: [40] U: compound 100% × 1 conc, Util+CS only
results.description: all-in compounding, tightest sector filter

results.name: [41] U: compound 50% × 2 conc + idle cash
results.description: balanced unleveraged: 2 concurrent + idle cash yield

results.name: [42] WF-ML > 0.55, broad sectors, $5K × 2 conc
results.description: walk-forward ML > 0.55, all sectors, no ocf2y, anti-mom; unleveraged

results.name: [43] WF-ML > 0.6, broad sectors, $5K × 2 conc
results.description: tighter walk-forward ML > 0.6 threshold

results.name: [44] WF-ML > 0.55, all events (no ocf/mom filter), $5K × 2
results.description: let WF-ML do all the heavy lifting — no rule-based filters except the score

results.name: [45] WF-ML > 0.55 + winning sectors + compound 50% × 2
results.description: winning sectors + walk-forward ML threshold + compounding (1x peak)

results.name: [46] WF-ML > 0.6 + Util+CS only + compound 100% × 1
results.description: tightest filter: WF-ML + most-profitable sectors + concentrated

results.name: [47] WF-ML > 0.5 + winning sectors + compound 100% × 1
results.description: looser ML threshold for more trades, single-position concentration

results.name: [48] Sector-prior α < -5%, broad
results.description: take trade only if prior same-sector events averaged α₁y < -5%; $5K × 2

results.name: [49] Sector-prior α < -10%, broad
results.description: stricter sector prior threshold

results.name: [50] Sector-prior α < -5% + compound 50% × 2
results.description: non-parametric sector predictor + unleveraged compounding

results.name: [51] Sector-prior α < -5% + compound 100% × 1
results.description: single position, full compounding, sector-prior filter

results.name: [52] Sector-prior α < -3% + idle cash + compound 50% × 2
results.description: looser sector-prior threshold for more trades, plus T-bill yield on idle

results.name: [53] FULL DEPLOY: Consumer Staples only, $10K × 1, compound 100%
results.description: highest-α sector only (CS hit 73% in backtest), full-portfolio concentration

results.name: [54] FULL DEPLOY: CS + sector-prior < -10%, $10K × 1
results.description: consumer staples only, plus require historical sector α < -10%

results.name: [55] FULL DEPLOY: stronger downtrend ≤ -10%, $10K × 1
results.description: winning sectors + only short stocks already down ≥10% in trailing 6m

results.name: [56] FULL DEPLOY: 2y hold, winning sectors, $10K × 1
results.description: longer hold captures multi-year decline; full deployment

results.name: [57] FULL DEPLOY: WF-ML > 0.65 + winning sectors + $10K × 1
results.description: high-ML-conviction filter + concentration; tests if ML threshold can pick winners despite low overall AUC

results.name: [58] 2x lev + Util+CS only + compound 100% × 1
results.description: leveraged single-position concentration in winning sectors

results.name: [59] 2x lev + winning sectors + compound 100% × 1
results.description: leveraged single-position, winning sectors (Util/CS/RE)

results.name: [60] 2x lev + CS only + idle cash + compound 100% × 1
results.description: highest-α sector + portfolio leverage + T-bill yield on idle, fully compounded

results.name: [61] 2x lev + delisted-strong-decline filter + compound 100%
results.description: include all sectors but require strong revenue decline (yoy_t < -10%)

results.name: [62] 2x lev + winning sectors + compound 50% × 2
results.description: balanced 2-position leveraged compound — moderate concentration

mlSizingVariant.name: ML-weighted sizing
mlSizingVariant.description: size = $10K × clamp(score-0.4, 0, 0.6)/0.6 — high-conviction trades scale up
